message:
fix(wl): let claim/done use joined wl-commons clone when server DB is absent

When wl-commons is joined via local clone (LocalDir) rather than served
via Dolt server, claim/done now fall back to running equivalent SQL
scripts directly in the clone directory. Also fixes empty Title output
in the local clone claim path by conditionally printing it.

Closes #2368

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
